series_metadata.series_description: Includes informaiton measuring the amount of radiation leakage utilizing "nickle 63". Provides information required by nuclear regulatory commission (NRC).

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office five years after replacement/discontinuence of equipment, if no problems occured during the life of the equipment, then destroy. If problems, retain in State Record Center until proficiency and survey reports are completed for the affected time, then destroy., Paper: Wastepaper
